sigma.description: Known population standard deviation of the variable.

mu_0.description: Population mean under the null hypothesis (μ₀). Used together with μₐ to construct the detectable difference Δ = μ₀ − μₐ = −20.

mu_a.description: Population mean under the alternative hypothesis (μₐ). Used together with μ₀ to construct the detectable difference Δ = μ₀ − μₐ = −20.

power.description: Statistical power (1 − β) of the z test, from which z_{1−β} = 1.28 is derived.

alpha.description: Two-sided significance level of the z test, from which z_{1−α/2} = 1.96 is derived.
